opportunities.title: [Hiring] Role: Marketing Project Coordinator - Remote USA
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Role: Marketing Project Coordinator - Remote USA

Hey Chicago folks, We are seeking a Marketing Operations/Project Coordinator with experience supporting product launches, packaging updates, and cross-functional marketing initiatives. This is a highly process-oriented role focused on project coordination, systems management, and ensuring marketing deliverables move through approval and launch processes efficiently. Good fit if you have the following requirements: 3–5+ years of experience in Marketing Operations, Project Coordination, Brand Management Support, Product Management Suppor

opportunities.title: Software Engineer, Onboarding
opportunities.description: About Ramp   Ramp is building the smart infrastructure for finance teams, embedded in the transaction flow of every dollar a business spends. We automate how over $200B in annualized spend flows in and out of 70,000+ companies: authorizing payments, flagging risk, categorizing spend, and closing books.  The problems are high-stakes, data-dense, and unforgiving.  We hire people with high agency and high urgency. We look for slope over intercept. opportunities.title: [Hiring] iPhone Home Screen + Lock Screen customization through FaceTime remote control ($25-$30)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] iPhone Home Screen + Lock Screen customization through FaceTime remote control ($25-$30)

I’m looking to hire someone to fully customize my iPhone aesthetic using FaceTime remote control. I do not want a tutorial or someone just telling me what to click. I want to watch while you do the custimization through FaceTime's remote control feature. I’ll be on the call the whole time supervising. (We can go over different ones I like on pinterest and if you do really good I will hire you for 2 other jobs related on different devices) What I need done: - Home Screen layout - Lock Screen setup
